title: Policy and Perception Drives Divergence in Panamax Market
section_path: Policy and Perception Drives Divergence in Panamax Market
section_path_text: Policy and Perception Drives Divergence in Panamax Market
summary:
Main
Image reference: RGB_COLOR_BRS_SHIPBROKERS_MONOGRAM_LOGO.png | assets/2025-07-29_policy-and-perception-drives-divergence-in-panamax-market_img_rgb-color-brs-shipbrokers-monogram-l_ee79606c8e74.png
Following a half year hibernation, Panamax freight rates have finally woken up. Freight rates have risen noticeably across all routes, while the transatlantic P1A route has undoubtedly stood out. This may be linked to the perception of the impact of USTR policies on the fundamental future dynamics of the shipping market.
